title: 目標達成の後に・邁進！

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
We seem to be gaining quite positive results
lately.
choice_data_list: You're getting used to the races too.
You're getting used to the races too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I owe that to the experience I acquire each
time I hit the course.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
And next year, I will be able to attempt the
Classics, so...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
As a stayer, I absolutely want to win the Kikuka
Sho and its prelude, the Kobe Shimbun Hai.
choice_data_list: We'll need to keep focused then!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I won't be lax in my training. I shall maintain
a proper condition to achieve success in the
Classics!
